untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific candlestick pattern (deliberation candlestick) and classic chart patterns (head-and-shoulders, double/triple tops) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators and operators. Pattern recognition at candlestick morphology level is not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate the core trend logic: longer-term downtrend (sma_200 > close) with shorter-term uptrend (close > sma_20). Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT based on whether pattern appears as reversal (within H&S/tops) or retracement continuation. Exit reverses the trend confirmation. However, the actual deliberation candlestick pattern recognition and its integration with classic patterns cannot be mechanically translated without candlestick morphology indicators.
